zh.lifeSummary: Simon Fenn是Sir William Fenne的兒子，於1494年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可德雷哈姆。他於1515年與Alice Aldington在英國英格蘭諾福爾可金也斯 琳結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1522年6月5日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可易斯林頓享年28歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可金也斯 琳。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Simon Fenn是Sir William Fenne的儿子，于1494年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可德雷哈姆。他于1515年与Alice Aldington在英国英格兰諾福爾可金也斯 琳结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1522年6月5日在英国英格兰諾福爾可易斯林頓享年28岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可金也斯 琳。

nameMeanings.name: Fenn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name in south-east England for someone who lived in a low-lying marshy area, from Middle English fen(ne) ‘fen, marsh’ (Old English fenn).
South German: topographic name from Old High German fenni, Middle Low German and Old Frisian fenne ‘bog’. Compare Fehn .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 馮, see   Feng   1.

variants.name: Fehn
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a bog or marsh, from fehn ‘bog’.

Norwegian: habitational name from any of the three farms in southeastern Norway named Fen, probably from Old Norse Fávin, of which the second element is vin ‘meadow’; the first element is unexplained.

variants.name: Fenner
meanings: English: from Middle English fen(ne) ‘fen, marsh’ (Old English fenn) + -er, a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a marsh or fen. Fenn Place in Worth in Sussex had owners called atte Fenne, who in the time of King Henry VI (1421–1471) apparently changed their name to Fenner. See Fenn .
English: variant of Fainer, from Middle English feiner, fener ‘haymonger, one who sells hay’ (Old French fenier), or perhaps a nickname from Middle English feiner ‘inventor; hypocrite’.
South German and Swiss German: occupational name for an ensign or standard bearer, from Middle High German vener, an agent derivative of Middle High German vane ‘flag’. See also Fenrich .

variants.name: Fenning
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English fen(ne) ‘fen, marsh’ (Old English fenn) + -ing, for someone who lived by a fen or marsh. Compare Fenn .

variants.name: Finner
meanings: German: topographic name from an agent derivative of Old High German fenni, Middle Low German and Old Frisian fenne ‘bog’ (see Fenn ).
German: ethnic name for a Finn (see   Finn   4).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: Simon Fenn was born in 1494, in Dereham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom as the son of Sir William Fenne. He married Alice Aldington in 1515, in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 5 June 1522, in Islington, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 28, and was buried in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Simon Fenn est né en 1494, à Dereham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Sir William Fenne. Il a épousé Alice Aldington en 1515, à King's Lynn, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 5 juin 1522, à Islington, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterré à King's Lynn, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Juni 1522 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Islington, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Alice Aldington nel 1515, nel King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Simon Fennは1494年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクデレハムでSir William Fenneの息子として生まれた。1515年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクキング'ス リンでAlice Aldingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1522年6月5日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクイスリントンで28歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクキング'ス リンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Fenn(은)는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 더함에서 Sir William Fenne의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 킨그'스 린에서 Alice Aldington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1522년 6월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 이슬링턴에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 킨그'스 린에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Simon Fenn родился в 1494 г. в местности дирэам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Sir William Fenne. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Aldington в 1515 г. в местности кинг'с линн, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 5 июня 1522 г. в местности ислингтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 28 лет и был похоронен в местности кинг'с линн, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
